steps.t: Gôbezhir has asked you to go to Zakhûr in eastern An Shêru to search for branches of sarláshi wood.
You have found several branches of sarláshi wood. You should return to Jiret-menêsh so you can give them to Gôbezhir.
You have found several branches of sarláshi wood. You talk to Gôbezhir and give them to him.
